トピック.授業計画1:
<Reading> In class, students will practice intensive reading skills and learn vocabulary by reading articles and completing response tasks for the graded readers.

< Speaking> EC2 Speaking has four main components: 1) students talk about themselves and their experiences 2) students study practical English items, and 3) students talk freely about a wide range of topics.
トピック.授業外学習2:
<Reading> Students will read graded readers, write graded reader response tasks, take online quizzes, and study vocabulary.

<Speaking> Students will complete homework activities to prepare for speaking in class.

教科書/Required texts0: You should bring your materials to class on your device (computer/tablet) or print and bring paper copies. If you do not bring a device, you should also bring a dictionary to class. You will also need to buy a pre-paid XReading card for Reading class.
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: Each class subject is arranged on the curriculum based on the Diploma Policy (DP) and Curriculum Policy (CP) established by each faculty and graduate school.By studying this course with DP/CP in mind, you will develop the abilities expected by each faculty and graduate school.The DP, CP, and curriculum table (list of classes, etc.) for each faculty/graduate school are posted in the link below, so please use them as a reference for your study plan.https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1*Link to kwic (only current students can view)
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading2: 備考　Note ＜Reading＞ Students will be assessed through unit tests, book tests, Xreading quizzes, and written responses to graded readers and discussions. ＜Speaking＞ Students will be assessed by speaking tests, homework tests and a Practical English Test. They also have to submit a piece of written homework and participate actively in class.

name: 【100】English Communication II(International Student)／English Communication II(International Student)
担当者: ジョーダン　Ｊ．（JORDAN JENNIFER ALINE）
成績評価備考:
備考　Note

＜Reading＞ Students will be assessed through unit tests, book tests, Xreading quizzes, and written responses to graded readers and discussions.
＜Speaking＞ Students will be assessed by speaking tests, homework tests and a Practical English Test. They also have to submit a piece of written homework and participate actively in class.
